Meaning: to expose; to reveal; to lay bare
copy (loanword, i.e. it sounds like copy)
directory (on computer hard drive); list; contents
access (verb), as in access a link or website
[something]~ squared, e.g. n 的平方 = n squared
[something]~ cubed, e.g. n 的立方 = n cubed
[something]~ to the power of ~[something], e.g. n 的 k 次方 = n to the power of k
